findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "waymark_contribute" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: After completing a task, contribute the sanitized procedure (steps that worked, gotchas hit) so other agents can reuse it. Submit procedure only — never credent…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "waymark_attest" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Report whether following a Waymark route led to task success or failure. Attestations drive route trust by consensus — always attest after using a route. Option…
